__fixture__.name: entry_row_open_local_folder_drag_drop
__fixture__.scenario: User drags a local folder onto the Aureline window. The drag-drop preview surface emits one entry_chooser_row_record with entry_chooser_row_kind = folder, entry_chooser_surface_class = drag_drop_preview, source_surface = drag_and_drop, entry_verb_candidate = open, target_kind_candidates = [local_folder, local_repo_root], resulting_mode_candidates = [folder, repo_root]. The folder is unfamiliar so trust_posture_class = trust_pending_until_admission and the row routes to review_trust_and_open. Activation pairs with the open_local_target sheet (entry_sheet_open_local_target.json). Demonstrates §3 verb matrix open row, §4.7 row-kind binding rule 2 (folder + open verb in non-switcher surface), §6 cross-surface invariant 6 (drop is a chooser surface, not a shortcut).
contract_sections: §6 rule 6 Drag-drop is a chooser surface, not a shortcut

presentation_subtitle: Trust is not granted on drop. Trust review opens after the folder activates.
